status.idle: Click to spin · drag to throw
status.todo_empty: No open items in the todo list

picker.name: Spinning Wheel
picker.description: A click-to-spin / drag-to-flick wheel with momentum-based physics.

editor.name: Card title
editor.result_entity_create_hint: Create a dedicated input_text helper. The wheel writes the winning label here after every spin so HA automations can trigger on `platform: state, entity_id: …`.
editor.result_entity_create_failed: Failed to create result helper. See browser console for details.
editor.todo_entity_helper: When set, the wheel's segments come from this todo list's open items (max 24). Segments and Labels are ignored while wired.
editor.todo_entity_empty_warning: ⚠ This todo list has no open items right now — the wheel will be empty until one is added.
editor.segments_helper: How many slices the wheel is divided into. 4 to 24.
editor.friction_helper: Wheel dampening, 1–10. 1 = long lazy spin, 5 = classic (default), 10 = stops quickly. Also scales the per-peg brake bump when Rim pegs are on.
editor.theme_helper: Built-in colour palette used when Colours is empty. Custom Colours overrides this.
editor.labels_helper: Type a label and press Enter; × to remove. Up to one per segment — fewer cycle (`A, B` on 8 → A B A B A B A B). MDI icons via `mdi:home`. Empty for 1..N.
editor.weights_helper: Comma-separated relative sizes — only the ratio matters. Cycles like labels (`3, 1` on 4 → big small big small). Empty for equal slices.
editor.colors_helper: Comma- or newline-separated CSS colours (hex / rgb / hsl / named). Mapped to unique labels in order of first appearance — segments sharing a label share a colour. Empty for the active theme palette.
editor.label_colors_helper: Comma- or newline-separated CSS colours for the segment label text. Same unique-label mapping as Colours. Empty for dark grey.
editor.hub_text_helper: Text shown on the centre hub. Defaults to SPIN. Empty to hide.
editor.hub_color_helper: Centre hub and pointer triangle. Theme uses your HA primary colour; Black gives white text on black; White gives black text on white.
editor.text_orientation_helper: How segment labels are oriented. Tangent wraps text around the rim; Radial reads along the spoke from rim to centre.
editor.sound_helper: Play a peg-click sound on each segment crossing. Volume scales with wheel speed.
editor.show_status_helper: Show the line beneath the wheel (`Spinning…` / `Result: X` / idle hint). Off for a more minimal look.
editor.actions_helper: Multi-pick script entities to fire on win, indexed to unique labels. Edits here REPLACE every string entry; full ActionConfig objects from YAML are appended. For per-row safety use Segment bindings.
editor.disable_confirm_actions_helper: Off (default) — the card asks before running a winning segment's action. On — actions fire silently. Use with care: a casual spin can run real automations.
editor.disable_boost_helper: Off (default) — clicks during a spin add another impulse, so rapid clicking keeps the wheel going. On — clicks during a spin are ignored. Useful for kid-friendly dashboards. Drag-to-throw is unaffected.
editor.half_circle_helper: Show only the upper half of the wheel as a dome — pointer at the top, hub at the bottom centre. Spinning physics are unchanged.
editor.selector_mode_helper: Drag the wheel to align a segment with the indicator and release to fire its action. No spinning, no momentum, no click-to-spin; hub text is hidden. Supersedes Disable click-to-boost.
editor.segment_borders_helper: Show a thin white line between adjacent segments. Off for a flatter, edge-to-edge look.
editor.pegs_helper: Stud the rim with small pegs, like a real prize wheel. Each peg gives the wheel a tiny brake bump as it passes the indicator. The peg-click sound is controlled separately via Click sound.
editor.peg_density_helper: Extra pegs to add inside each segment, on top of the boundary peg. 0 = boundary pegs only; 1 = boundary + 1 mid (default); 4 = densely studded. More pegs = more clicks and more total braking per spin.
editor.wheel_context_helper: When on, every fired action gets the winning segment merged into its `data` payload: `wheel_index`, `wheel_label`, `wheel_color`, `wheel_color_rgb`, `wheel_label_color`, `wheel_label_color_rgb`. A single generic script reading those fields can then handle every segment. User-supplied data keys override the auto-injected ones.
editor.result_entity_helper: Optional `input_text.*` helper to receive the winning label after every spin. Triggers automations on `platform: state, entity_id: …`. Click "Create dedicated helper" below (admin only) for a fresh one — every spin overwrites it.
editor.advanced_helper: Raw arrays for paste-from-YAML, CSS keywords, `var(--…)`, or full Lovelace ActionConfig objects. Edits in Segment bindings above keep these in sync.
editor.footer_hint: Click for a random impulse spin, or click-and-drag to throw — release velocity drives the spin. Friction decays it until it stops.

errors.segments_range: segments must be an integer between 4 and 24
errors.friction_range: friction must be an integer between 1 and 10 (or one of the legacy presets: low, medium, high)
errors.labels_type: labels must be an array of strings
errors.labels_length: labels length ({len}) must not exceed segments ({segments})
errors.weights_type: weights must be an array of positive numbers
errors.weights_empty: weights must contain at least one entry
errors.weights_length: weights length ({len}) must not exceed segments ({segments})
errors.colors_type: colors must be an array of non-empty strings
errors.colors_empty: colors must contain at least one entry
errors.colors_length: colors length ({len}) must not exceed segments ({segments})
errors.label_colors_type: label_colors must be an array of non-empty strings
errors.label_colors_empty: label_colors must contain at least one entry
errors.label_colors_length: label_colors length ({len}) must not exceed segments ({segments})
errors.theme_value: theme must be one of: default, pastel, pride, neon
errors.hub_color_value: hub_color must be one of: theme, black, white
errors.todo_entity_invalid: todo_entity must be a todo.* entity_id
errors.actions_type: actions must be an array of script.* entity IDs, action objects, or null entries
errors.actions_length: actions length ({len}) must not exceed segments ({segments})
errors.actions_string: actions string entries must be a script.* entity_id (got: {value})
errors.peg_density_range: peg_density must be an integer between 0 and 4
errors.result_entity_invalid: result_entity must be an input_text.* entity_id
